title: lagenaria vulgaris var. hispida
intro: Lagenaria vulgaris var. hispida, also known as the prickly calabash or calabash gourd, is a variety of the Lagenaria siceraria plant, a species of vining plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lagenaria vulgaris var. hispida include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, and its seeds are also used as a natural remedy for various health issues.
